docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE - APPROVED SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT TO DEC-19-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SANABRIA, LILIBERTH AS TO DEFENDANT CASTROGUTIERREZ, LUIS SECURITAS SECURITY SERVICES USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $0.00 SERVED SEP-10-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SECURITAS SECURITY SERVICES USA, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LILIBERTH SANABRIA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS CASTROGUTIERREZ IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
